source_pr.title: sessionctx/binloginfo: fix race.
source_pr.body: close DDL before set PumpClient to nil.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under the race detector because background DDL could still be running while global PumpClient was being cleared during teardown. This PR stabilizes it by stopping DDL before setting PumpClient to nil.
fix_pattern: Stop background workers (e.g., DDL) before clearing shared globals in teardown to avoid data races.
